name: sdlc-workflow-codex
description: Native Codex SDLC plugin: one handwritten $wf workflow skill (19 sub-commands spanning intake modes fix/rca/investigate/discover/hotfix/refactor/update-deps/ideate, shape, slice, plan, implement, verify, review, handoff, ship, retro, design, docs, probe, simplify, status/recap) plus consult, imagery, uiproto, diataxis, and setup-wide-logging — over the same shared runtime, hub, and .ai/ artifacts as the Claude sdlc-workflow plugin. Requires a hooks-GA Codex CLI (verified on 0.143.0) with hooks enabled.

interface.longDescription: A handwritten Codex-native SDLC plugin sharing its lifecycle with the Claude sdlc-workflow plugin: a single $wf workflow skill (19 sub-commands, intake through ship plus review, design, docs, probe, and simplify) and five independent engineering skills (consult, imagery, uiproto, diataxis, setup-wide-logging), driving a 10-stage lifecycle with per-slice artifacts, runtime-truth verification, and a shared machine-wide hub/runtime that both hosts adopt. Skills are handwritten for Codex; the runtime, hub, renderer, schemas, and .ai/ artifacts are shared. Review and trust the bundled hooks before activation.
defaultPrompt: $wf status — then run the next SDLC stage for this workflow ($wf is the skill; `wf` is NOT a shell command — on Windows it opens the Firewall console).
$wf review — review the current branch across the pre-merge dimensions.
$wf intake fix — investigate and fix this failing test.
